text: Effective team management relies on clear communication and thoughtful delegation. A good leader ensures that each member understands their role and has the tools to succeed. Regular feedback, both positive and constructive, helps people grow and feel valued. Motivation often comes from recognising effort and celebrating small wins. When conflicts arise, they should be addressed calmly and openly, focusing on solutions rather than blame. By balancing these elements, a manager can create a supportive environment where the team works together efficiently and feels engaged in their shared goals.
